bird.name: 鹊鹞
bird.summary: 鹊鹞（学名：Circus melanoleucos）为鹰科鹞属的鸟类。在中国大陆，又名花泽鵟，是亞洲的一種猛禽，屬於鷹科鷂屬。 分布 分布于内蒙古、东北、青海、辽宁、河北、山东、安徽、从长江向东达四川、向南到云南、贵州、广东、海南、福建、广西等地。该物种的模式产地在斯里兰卡。

relations.subject: 鹊鹞
relations.evidence: Their wintering range is from eastern India and Sri Lanka, through South East Asia to the Philippines and Borneo. Their habitat in the north is primarily steppes or boggy birch scrubs and in the south they spend their time in paddy fields and swamps
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 鹊鹞
relations.evidence: The pied harrier is ranked as least concern according to the IUCN, although the population is thought to be decreasing, likely due to drainage and agricultural development. In 1986, over 14500 were counted flying over northeast China during a migration period
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
